title: plugin-manager:load-plugin-use-case
description: Use case that loads and validates a single plugin. Returns the loaded plugin or an error.
context: Use case that loads and validates a single plugin. Returns the loaded plugin or an error.

rules:
The use case MUST:

1. Load the plugin via `PluginLoader`
2. Validate the plugin implements the expected interface
3. Return the plugin or an error

constraints: Errors are typed for catchable handling.

scenarios.name: Plugin loaded
when: LoadPlugin is executed with valid plugin

scenarios.name: Plugin not found
when: LoadPlugin is executed with non-existent plugin

scenarios.name: Loads plugin via PluginLoader
then: it loads the plugin via PluginLoader
AND validates the plugin implements the expected interface
